caption: A person's hand, wearing a dark grey long-sleeved garment, interacts with a printed product catalog titled "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE." The catalog features winter-themed greeting cards and stationery with images of snowy landscapes and frosted foliage. In the beginning, the person's index finger points toward a variety of small, rectangular card designs. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves to point toward a different section of the page featuring a brown card with a "Greetings" label. The page includes various text elements, such as "WISHING YOU A SEASON FULL OF FAMILY, FRIENDS," "You warm my heart," and "SENDING YOU A LITTLE Yuletide Cheer." By the end, the person is holding the edges of the catalog with both hands, centering the view on the winter-themed layouts and decorative scripts.
